About Me 🐸

Design Lav ✏️
Hi, I'm Lavanya, a visual designer who loves creating fun, expressive interfaces and brand experiences.

Outside design, you'll usually find me journaling, painting, experimenting with crafts, or obsessing over tiny creative details.
Content Lav 📱
I've recently stepped into content creation, collaborating with lifestyle, beauty, and tech brands through UGC and partnerships.

In just two months, I've grown to 6K+ followers and reached over 8 million people through design education and comedy content.

Experience 🌿

Airtribe
Aug 2025 – Feb 2026
▾
What I Did
Designed campaign, community, and learner experiences that made the rebrand feel visible and cohesive.
What I Learned
Brand experience is shaped through every interaction, not just the final visual.
ToolJet
Dec 2024 – May 2025
▾
What I Did
Spearheaded a full brand refresh and redesigned the website to communicate ToolJet's vision as an open-source low-code platform.
What I Learned
The art of translating complex developer tools into approachable, friendly design languages.
Max Fashion
Jun 2024 – Jul 2024
▾
What I Did
Created visual design assets, campaign graphics, and in-store digital displays for one of India's leading fashion retail brands.
What I Learned
Retail design at scale — maintaining brand consistency across hundreds of touchpoints under tight deadlines.
